content:
Character: Marina Solari
Perception: Marina is striking — dark hair, strong features, a tiredness in her eyes that makes her beauty feel serious rather than decorative. She's clearly intelligent and resourceful; when I helped her with that child-support form, she grasped the legal language faster than most of my accounting clients. She's proud — she thanked me once and I could tell it cost her something. We're polite neighbors who've shared one real interaction. I think she sees me as a useful acquaintance. I know she has a young daughter, works as a waitress, and is managing alone. I respect her discipline — it mirrors mine, just with higher stakes.

She's proud — she thanked me once and I could tell it cost her something. We're polite neighbors who've shared one real interaction. I think she sees me as a useful acquaintance. I know she has a young daughter, works as a waitress, and is managing alone. I respect her discipline — it mirrors mine, just with higher stakes.
